mapper.sql: a.*, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM enterprise_account_application a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM enterprise_account_application a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM enterprise_account_application a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.status = UPPER(#{status})
AND ( a.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE enterprise_account_application SET status = #{status}, review_memo = #{reviewMemo}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enterprise_job_policy ( user_id, trusted, create_requires_review, edit_requires_review, max_active_posts, updated_by, update_reason ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{trusted}, #{createRequiresReview}, #{editRequiresReview}, #{maxActivePosts}, #{updatedBy}, #{updateReason} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE trusted = VALUES(trusted), create_requires_review = VALUES(create_requires_review), edit_requires_review = VALUES(edit_requires_review), max_active_posts = VALUES(max_active_posts), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), update_reason = VALUES(update_reason), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enterprise_job_posting WHERE company_user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('PENDING_REVIEW', 'PUBLISHED')
mapper.sql: j.*, u.email AS owner_email, u.name AS owner_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enterprise_job_posting ( company_user_id, company_name, title, position_title, job_category, specialties_json, duties, qualifications, preferred, benefits, employment_type, experience_level, education_level, salary_type, salary_min, salary_max, salary_text, work_location, work_schedule, headcount, application_start_at, application_end_at, apply_url, contact_email, contact_phone, visibility, status, review_status, review_memo ) VALUES ( #{companyUserId}, #{companyName}, #{title}, #{positionTitle}, #{jobCategory}, CAST(#{specialtiesJson} AS JSON), #{duties}, #{qualifications}, #{preferred}, #{benefits}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{educationLevel}, #{salaryType}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{salaryText}, #{workLocation}, #{workSchedule}, #{headcount}, #{applicationStartAt}, #{applicationEndAt}, #{applyUrl}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewMemo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE enterprise_job_posting SET company_name = #{companyName}, title = #{title}, position_title = #{positionTitle}, job_category = #{jobCategory}, specialties_json = CAST(#{specialtiesJson} AS JSON), duties = #{duties}, qualifications = #{qualifications}, preferred = #{preferred}, benefits = #{benefits}, employment_type = #{employmentType}, experience_level = #{experienceLevel}, education_level = #{educationLevel}, salary_type = #{salaryType}, salary_min = #{salaryMin}, salary_max = #{salaryMax}, salary_text = #{salaryText}, work_location = #{workLocation}, work_schedule = #{workSchedule}, headcount = #{headcount}, application_start_at = #{applicationStartAt}, application_end_at = #{applicationEndAt}, apply_url = #{applyUrl}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, visibility = #{visibility}, status = #{status}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_memo = #{reviewMemo}, pending_revision_json = CASE WHEN #{pendingRevisionJson} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(#{pendingRevisionJson} AS JSON) END, approved_by = COALESCE(#{approvedBy}, approved_by), approved_at = CASE WHEN #{approvedBy} IS NULL THEN approved_at ELSE NOW() END, reviewed_by = COALESCE(#{reviewedBy}, reviewed_by), reviewed_at = CASE WHEN #{reviewedBy} IS NULL THEN reviewed_at ELSE NOW() END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM enterprise_job_posting j JOIN users u ON u.id = j.company_user_id WHERE j.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM enterprise_job_posting j JOIN users u ON u.id = j.company_user_id WHERE j.company_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY j.created_at DESC, j.id DESC

SELECT FROM enterprise_job_posting j JOIN users u ON u.id = j.company_user_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND (j.status = UPPER(#{status}) OR j.review_status = UPPER(#{status}))
AND ( j.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.position_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY j.updated_at DESC, j.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
